src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster version.
Remove unnecessary whitespace and braces from the annotation interface definition.
Update Liquibase properties import to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with security best practices or framework defaults.
Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where the type is obvious.
Extract application name property into a local variable to improve readability and reuse in the startup log message.
Reformat multi-line Optional chains and string literals for better readability.
Realign string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut annotations for consistent indentation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Realign method call arguments in logger.error statements for consistent indentation.

Replace explicit Logger type declaration with var for local variable inference.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested Liquibase configuration class to manage async start settings within ApplicationProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field, getter, and static inner class with asyncStart property.

Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable type inference.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API introduced in SLF4J 2.0 to ensure compatibility with modern logging frameworks.
Rename the constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS to improve naming consistency or clarity.
Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.

Remove the custom KeyGenerator bean and its associated dependencies as it is no longer needed or supported.
Remove setter methods for GitProperties and BuildProperties that were used to inject the now-removed fields.
Remove imports for classes that are no longer referenced in the code.
Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support conditional bean creation.
Add conditional annotation to H2 TCP server bean to only start if H2 console is enabled.
Refactor logger instance to use static final field convention.

Refactor logger instance to use a static final constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Inject ApplicationProperties to allow runtime configuration of Liquibase startup behavior.
Add logic to conditionally initialize Liquibase asynchronously based on application properties.
